name: CSRA Inc.
name_former: Computer Sciences Corporation (public sector business) and SRA International
description: CSRA Inc. was a leading provider of next-generation IT solutions and professional services to the U.S. government, serving defense, intelligence, homeland security, and federal civilian agencies. Formed in 2015 through the merger of the public sector business of Computer Sciences Corporation (CSC) and SRA International, the company specialized in cloud computing, cybersecurity, enterprise IT, and systems engineering. In April 2018, CSRA Inc. was acquired by General Dynamics and integrated into General Dynamics Information Technology (GDIT).
